title: phlox andicola subsp. parvula
intro: Phlox andicola subsp. parvula, also known as Dwarf Panola Phlox, is a species of flowering plant in the phlox family (Polemoniaceae) that is native to the southeastern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Phlox andicola subsp. parvula include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
